technical_description: Ranked / windowed analysis for referrals: 19 output column(s) sourced from 12 base table(s) (REFERRAL, REFERRAL_BED_DAY, REFERRAL_HIST, REFERRAL_HISTORY, RFL_HX_ACT...). Computed columns: DENIAL_ROW, DENIAL_DATE, DENIAL_REASON, RFI_ROW, RFI_DATE. Constrained by: EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM Clarity.dbo.REFERRAL_HIST AS RFLH WHERE RFLH.REFERRAL_ID = RFL.Referralid AND RFLH.NEW_RFL_STATUS_C = 5 /* Denied */ UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM Clarity.dbo.REFERRAL_BED_DAY AS RFLBD WHERE RFL.Referralid = RFLBD.REFERRAL_ID AND RFLBD.BED_DAY_STATUS_C = 2 /* Denied */); EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM CookClarity.Reporting.V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequestStatusHistory_Fact AS aughx WHERE aughx.AUTH_REQUEST_ID = aug.AUTH_REQUEST_ID AND aughx.UM_STATUS_C = 5 /* Denied */); RFLHA.REFERRAL_ID = RFLH.REFERRAL_ID AND RFLHA.GROUP_LINE = RFLH.LINE; RFLHIC.REFERRAL_ID = RFLHA.REFERRAL_ID AND RFLHIC.GROUP_LINE = RFLHA.GROUP_LINE AND RFLHIC.VALUE_LINE = RFLHA.VALUE_LINE AND RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE IN (50 /* Referral Status */, 18007 /* Denial Reason */, 18003 /* Pending Reason */, 2081 /* Bed Day Status */, 2080 /* Bed Day Denied Reason */); RFLHNV.REFERRAL_ID = RFLHA.REFERRAL_ID AND RFLHNV.GROUP_LINE = RFLHA.GROUP_LINE AND RFLHNV.VALUE_LINE = RFLHA.VALUE_LINE AND ((RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 18007 AND NOT RFLHNV.NEW_VAL IS NULL) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 18003 AND RFLHNV.NEW_VAL = 1640000010 /* Request for Information */) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 50 AND RFLHNV.NEW_VAL = '5' /* Denied */) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 2081 AND RFLHNV.NEW_VAL = '2' /* Denied */) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 2080 AND NOT RFLHNV.NEW_VAL IS NULL)); authx.UM_STATUS = 'Denied' OR (authx.UM_STATUS = 'Pending Review' AND authx.UM_PENDING_RSN = 'HP Request for Information').
business_description: Identifies the most recent denied or pending referrals, limited to there exists a row where either (where New Rfl Status = 'Denied') or (where Bed Day Status = 'Denied'); there exists a row where Um Status = 'Denied'; Item Change in ('Referral Status', 'Denial Reason', 'Pending Reason', 'Bed Day Status', 'Bed Day Denied Reason'); Item Change = 18007 and New Val is not null or Item Change = 18003 and New Val = 'Request for Information' or Item Change = 50 and New Val = 'Denied' or Item Change = 2081 and New Val = 'Denied' or Item Change = 2080 and New Val is not null; Um Status = 'Denied' or Um Status = 'Pending Review' and Um Pending Rsn = 'HP Request for Information'.
source_tables: REFERRAL, REFERRAL_BED_DAY, REFERRAL_HIST, REFERRAL_HISTORY, RFL_HX_ACT, RFL_HX_ITEM_CHANGE, RFL_HX_NEW_VAL, V_CCHP_AuthHeader_Fact, V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationHistory_Fact, V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequestStatusHistory_Fact, V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequest_Fact, V_CCHP_UMAuthorization_Fact
